name: Hyatt Regency Seattle
content:
My travel partner had booked us at the Hyatt Regency Seattle. I arrived early and went to check us in. What we did not know was that the Hyatt will allow you to book a room if you are under 21, but will not let you check in if you are under 21 (both me and my travel partner were under 21 at the time). This was resolved by finding a friend of a friend who lived in Seattle and was over 21, adding him to our guest list, and having him check us in. Realistically, I could have found any person on the street with a valid ID and paid them twenty bucks to check us in.
Unrelated, but they have a pretty neat stairwell that runs through the entire building. I can’t remember how I found it. The conference space is pretty nice, but the restaurant located in the hotel is overpriced in my opinion.
